review_comment: This uses all the macros defined in https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr/pull/80649 by copying them here. I think the better way is to make this PR depending on #80649 or cherry-pick the commits.
As this was merged first, I will fix the conflict in https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr/pull/80649 then.
This was opened 2 weeks before #80649, so got started with putting some custom macros, and then forgot to rebase it on #80649. Thank you for fixing these macros on #80649!
